prose:
The frontier-orbital energies for benzene were calculated using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`) in PySCF. The calculation was performed in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The geometry was sourced from the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz` file, and no re-optimization was performed. The SCF converged successfully in 8 cycles. Density fitting (RI approximation) was not used.

The highest occupied molecular orbital (HOMO) energy is -7.04683 eV.
The lowest unoccupied molecular orbital (LUMO) energy is -0.41575 eV.
The HOMO-LUMO gap is 6.63109 eV.

The calculation is trustworthy.
